_comment: Cinematic-anime short: a girl befriends a forest spirit. 8 shots, single-subject each, consistent character. Render keyframes first (film.build_keyframe_workflow) to check consistency, then shots (film.build_shot_workflow).
title: THE FOREST FRIEND
character: A young girl about ten years old with a short black bob and a small red hair ribbon, big curious dark eyes, wearing a pale blue dress with white collar and red rain boots
style: Studio Ghibli style cinematic anime film still, lush hand-painted forest, soft golden god-rays through the canopy, delicate detailed linework, painterly depth, warm magical nostalgic atmosphere, masterpiece anime film frame, 1980s-1990s cel anime aesthetic

shots.keyframe: wide establishing shot, the girl steps into a vast ancient mossy forest, shafts of golden light beam through towering trees, drifting motes of light and mist, she looks up in wonder
shots.motion: the girl walks slowly forward into the forest, light motes drift through the air, mist curls gently, leaves sway, the camera slowly pushes in, serene magical Studio Ghibli motion

shots.keyframe: medium shot, the girl kneels among glowing ferns and mushrooms, leaning in curiously toward a soft blue glow hidden in the moss, dappled light on her face
shots.motion: the girl leans in slowly, the ferns and glowing plants sway gently, soft light pulses, dust motes float, subtle calm motion

shots.keyframe: close-up, a small round fluffy white forest spirit the size of a cat with big gentle black eyes and tiny leaf-like ears peeks out from the moss, softly glowing, surrounded by tiny lights
shots.motion: the little forest spirit blinks and tilts its head, its glow pulses softly, tiny lights drift around it, its ears twitch, gentle magical motion

shots.keyframe: two-shot, the girl slowly reaches out an open hand toward a small round fluffy white forest spirit the size of a melon, perfectly round and soft like a puffball, with two big gentle black eyes and two tiny green leaf-shaped ears on top, no wings and no arms, softly glowing, which sits on a mossy rock, both lit by warm forest light, tender gentle moment, no wings
shots.motion: the girl's hand reaches out slowly and the little spirit floats up to sniff it, both moving gently, lights drifting, delicate tentative motion

shots.keyframe: extreme close-up of the girl's face lighting up with pure joy and wonder, a bright smile, hands clasped near her chin, warm dappled golden light, tiny glowing lights reflected in her wide sparkling eyes, no objects in hands
shots.motion: the girl's face breaks into a delighted smile, her hair stirs in a soft breeze, glowing lights drift past, her eyes shine, gentle emotional motion

shots.keyframe: a small round fluffy white forest spirit the size of a melon, perfectly round and soft like a puffball, with two big gentle black eyes and two tiny green leaf-shaped ears on top, no wings and no arms, softly glowing floats and bobs ahead leading the girl deeper along a glowing enchanted forest path, she follows with arms out, wide magical shot, no wings
shots.motion: the round fluffy spirit bobs and drifts forward and the girl runs after it happily, the glowing forest drifts past, lights swirl, flowing joyful motion, camera tracking

shots.keyframe: wide magical shot, the girl and the little spirit stand in a clearing as dozens of glowing forest spirits and fireflies rise into the air all around them, breathtaking
shots.motion: countless glowing spirits and fireflies rise and swirl slowly into the air around the still girl, soft lights everywhere, awe-struck gentle motion, slow camera rise

shots.keyframe: peaceful wide shot at golden hour, the girl sits at the forest edge with a small round fluffy white forest spirit the size of a melon, perfectly round and soft like a puffball, with two big gentle black eyes and two tiny green leaf-shaped ears on top, no wings and no arms, softly glowing nestled cozily beside her, both looking out over a glowing valley, warm sunset light, no wings
shots.motion: the girl and the little spirit sit together breathing softly, grass and hair sway in a gentle breeze, warm light shifts, distant lights twinkle, calm resolving motion, slow push-in

creature: a small round fluffy white forest spirit the size of a melon, perfectly round and soft like a puffball, with two big gentle black eyes and two tiny green leaf-shaped ears on top, no wings and no arms, softly glowing
